title: Chris Weir: Well Flung
full_description: For his debut hour, Chris Weir takes audiences through his first-ever holiday fling on the cruising beaches of Gran Canaria — a modern romcom navigating the grey areas of a five-day romance, sudden monogamy, financial imbalance, wandering eyes, and the question of whether companionship is actually worth it, or whether we're better off alone.
ai_summary: BBC Scotland presenter Chris Weir's debut hour — a tight, warm comedy about a Gran Canaria fling that asks whether accelerated holiday intimacy can survive contact with real life, and whether the answer even matters.
